# 获取视频号视频点赞数、评论数等互动信息

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取视频号视频点赞数、评论数等互动信息
      deprecated: false
      description: |-
        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        code = 0 | 调用成功
        101      |object_id 错误请检查
        102      |last_buffer 错误请检查
        103      |获取留言失败
        105      |请求类型不存在
        20001    |金额不足
        50000    |服务器内部错误



        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        ['count_info']['comment_count']  |评论数
        ['count_info']['forward_count']  |转发数
        ['count_info']['like_count']     |喜欢数 （小心心图标，官方媒体是火的图标）
        ['count_info']['fav_count']      |点赞数 （大拇指图标）
        ['comment_info']   |评论列表
        ['last_buffer']   |翻页参数 首页不填，第二页以后填入上一页返回的 last_buffer
        ['cost']   |花费
        ['remain_money'] | 余额
      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                object_id:
                  type: string
                  description: 视频唯一id 例如 ：14462543356698040491
                object_nonce_id:
                  type: string
                  description: 该参数不填也可以，建议填上
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了key （0.04/次）
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 如果设置了需要填写
                type:
                  type: string
                  description: 固定值 type=9
              x-apifox-orders:
                - object_id
                - object_nonce_id
                - type
                - key
                - verifycode
              required:
                - object_id
                - key
                - type
            example:
              object_id: 14462543356698040000
              object_nonce_id: ''
              type: 9
              last_buffer: ''
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                    description: 状态码
                  count_info:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      comment_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 评论数
                      like_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 喜欢数（小心心 ）
                      forward_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 转发数
                      fav_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 点赞数（大拇指）
                      version_data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          data_version:
                            type: integer
                            description: 上述评论点赞数获取的时间
                        required:
                          - data_version
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - data_version
                        description: 缓存版本号
                    required:
                      - comment_count
                      - like_count
                      - forward_count
                      - fav_count
                      - version_data
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - comment_count
                      - like_count
                      - forward_count
                      - fav_count
                      - version_data
                  last_buffer:
                    type: string
                    description: 翻页参数
                  down_continue_flag:
                    type: integer
                    description: 是否可翻页
                  cost:
                    type: number
                    description: 花费
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                    description: 余额
                required:
                  - code
                  - count_info
                  - last_buffer
                  - down_continue_flag
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - count_info
                  - last_buffer
                  - down_continue_flag
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-389255941-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
